reviews.text: BEWARE. This place is an absolute scam. I ordered two bacon cheezeburgers. I was sent what appears to be three real meat chicken nuggets with mayo on a sad disgusting bun along with real cheese. Absolutely despicable that this restaurant is doing this. DO NOT ORDER FROM HERE!

reviews.site: WTF! - Mind-Blowing Vegan Burgers🌱(Kensal Rise - Station Terrace)
reviews.text: BEWARE. This place is an absolute scam. I ordered two bacon cheezeburgers. I was sent what appears to be three real meat chicken nuggets with mayo on a sad disgusting bun along with real cheese. Absolutely despicable that this restaurant is doing this. DO NOT ORDER FROM HERE!

This is the worst takeaway I have ever had.  

I thought I hadn't been given rice with my meal until I realised the weird gloop at the bottom of the bowl was the rice.  At first I thought it was congealed sauce because of how it looked, then I thought they'd given me an omelette because of the consistency.  Eventually I figured out it was gross rice.  

The chicken was too dry, and I like dry chicken.  The crispy coating tasted burnt.  The coleslaw was basically bitter mush. 

If it hadn't been so late at night, I would have thrown it away and ordered from somewhere else which would have been a first for me.  I do not throw food away just because I do not like it unless it has literally gone bad.

Unfortunately, I was hungry and had no food in the house, so I ate what I could of it.  I should have gone to bed hungry.

This is the first time I have ever been glad to have been given a disappointingly small portion of food.

reviews.site: Koreatown - Korean Fried Chicken (Westcliff-on-Sea - London Rd)
reviews.text: The best chicken ribs I've ever had. Always piping hot and tasty. Prefer not to have dressing on top of chicken ribs but No other option.
Abit more chicken and it would be 10/10. Very good

reviews.site: Wing Fest All Stars (Leigh-On-Sea - London Rd )
reviews.text: Wing sauces were banging some of the best I’ve had. chicken was also really nice and well cooked. Chips were decent.

All round low quality food. The wings were soggy and horrible. The burger barely had any cheese or sauce or any extras it claimed to have. The chips were cheap like a bowling alley. Could’ve made it all better myself at home buying ingredients from Iceland

Thought to try this place on a whim. really glad we did, the chicken tenders were awesome, the loaded fries were awesome. The portion size on the skin on fries could be better. but will definitely order again.
Food was over cooked. Got an additional item I couldn’t eat. Missing items. Wrong burger/the burger was incorrectly marketed

I always ordered from here but this time , it tasted different from usual. The beef is undercooked and the burger is different from the description from the app. If I remember correctly, this shop usually send their food with their logo. This time, there is no logo. The taste is different. I like the fried here and pay extra just to eat fries. Will not order again.

BBq burger was a bit on the small size but overall it was delicious. It was piping hot too!
So all in all I would buy again. They had a great buy one get one free offer.. would recommend.

reviews.site: Koreatown - Korean Fried Chicken (Benfleet - High Rd)
reviews.text:
This was our first time ordering from here and there were quite a few issues with our order. The coleslaw was just lettuce with sauce, the rice was some type of yellow rice instead of white rice, with some of the rice stained red, and there was a piece of a plastic fork found in one of our bowls.

I thought it tasted okay at first, but the more I ate, the more I was disappointed and realised more issues with it.

reviews.site: Hot Chick - Award-Winning Saucy Fried Chicken (Kenilworth - Warwick Rd)
reviews.text: This food is AMAZING!!! I really recommend the Doritos Loaded bowls they do. They are FULL of flavour! Can't go wrong!!
Small portion size, tangy not Smokey, and extremely wet. Such poor food quality means two things. One they don’t care about the people they serve or two they are laundering for their money

DONT WASTE YOUR MONEY ! Genuinely the worst smash burger I’ve had! No flavour at all in the burger and no sauce other than truffle sauce also barely any of it. So bland and 90% oil - bread was soaked in oil had to remove it and tried to eat the patty - no flavour very bland. Waste of money and will not be buying again.

reviews.site: Koreatown - Korean Fried Chicken (Bristol - Southmead Rd)
reviews.text: The description of the food is totally misleading. We ordered two rice bowls and a gyoza. The rice bowl was just plain boiled rice. A bit of iceberg lettuce salad and picked red cabbage. The chicken was fine but we ordered bbq chicken and it came with mayo. The gyoza was just one large vegetable samosa.
It was so delicious.
